top_signals.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of obtaining illicit access to Claude
top_signals.summary: AI company says Chinese ecommerce group used fake accounts to ‘extract’ chatbot’s capabilities
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. defense firm Anduril in talks for Nissan plant to build drones in Japan, sources say
top_signals.summary: While sources say no decision has been made, any deal could transform one of Japan's first large-scale postwar car factories into ​a weapons hub.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix ADR Seen Driving 30% Upside as Micron Gap Narrows
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s push for a US listing is spurring talk of another prize for shareholders: a potentially higher market value that may narrow its gap with US rival Micron Technology Inc.
